evidenceSnippetOriginal: Though companies like Turnitin, ZeroGPT, and OpenAI have all developed AI detection capabilities, we do not recommend you use such software to attempt to determine if student work is AI-generated. Our recommendation against using these tools is based both on Princeton's standards for scholarly integrity and the practical limits of these tools. Detection tools seem unreliable at best and biased at worst.
